name: Yash Shrivastav
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Passionate MERN Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable and performant full-stack web applications. Proficient in React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, with a strong focus on clean code, intuitive UI, and seamless API integration.

experience.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Maintained MERN app (Bun runtime) for 500K+ users; built 15+ React components with React Hooks + Axios API integration — cut latency ~30%, bundle size ~40%, Lighthouse scores +20pts.
Built Tutorix pages with Tailwind CSS, React Router, and a custom Video.js player with full playback controls for 200K+ learners across all major browsers.
Redesigned pages with Three.js animations and Mongoose-backed MongoDB models, boosting engagement by 18% across all breakpoints.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
achievements: Shipped 10+ SPAs using React Hooks, React Router, and Redux Toolkit — cut re-renders 35% and deployment time 50% via Agile CI/CD pipelines and Git workflows.
Migrated 3 PHP codebases to React + TypeScript with Vite, code-splitting, and Axios — cut bundle size 45% and improved Time-to-Interactive by 2+ seconds.

experience.title: Web Developer Intern
achievements: Built 8+ responsive web apps with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and PHP/Laravel using MVC patterns and Fetch API — achieved 98% W3C compliance and cut API response time 20%.
Boosted performance via minification, lazy loading, and caching — reduced page load time 35% and maintained 90+ PageSpeed scores.

projects.title: myCart - E-commerce Full-Stack Application
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce app with JWT auth, cart/checkout, and Mongoose ODM — optimized queries/indexing to cut API response time ~35%; 90+ Lighthouse score. Node.js/Express RESTful endpoints for product and order operations with modular route structure.

projects.title: AI Tools Hub - AI Tools Directory
projects.description: MERN AI tools directory with category browsing, reviews, and video lessons — reduced page load ~40% via Vite, lazy loading, and code splitting. Node.js/Express + Mongoose REST APIs across modular routes; React frontend with Axios, React Hooks, and React Router for navigation.

certificates.name: Full Stack Development with MERN Stack
